info.title: Vocobase Partner API
info.description: API for managing voice AI agents, documents, and calls on the Vocobase platform.

tags.name: Config
tags.description: Read and update partner configuration, webhook settings, and telephony credentials.

tags.name: Agents
tags.description: Create, read, update, and delete voice AI agents.

tags.name: Voices
tags.description: List available voices for agent configuration.

tags.name: Documents
tags.description: Upload, manage, and delete knowledge base documents.

tags.name: Agent Documents
tags.description: Link and unlink documents to agents for knowledge base integration.

tags.name: Calls
tags.description: Initiate outbound calls and view call history.

tags.name: Campaigns
tags.description: Create and run outbound calling campaigns. Upload contacts in bulk, start/pause/resume/stop the campaign, and monitor progress.

tags.name: Projects
tags.description: Organize agents into projects. Every agent belongs to exactly one project.

tags.name: Dictionaries
tags.description: Soniox STT dictionary CRUD and agent attachment.

get.description: Returns the current partner configuration including webhook status, telephony setup, agent limits, and allowed voices/languages. Sensitive values are masked.

put.description: Configures the webhook URL for receiving call status updates. A new webhook secret is generated on each call. Save the returned secret immediately -- it will not be shown again.

webhook_url.description: HTTPS URL to receive webhook events.

200.description: Webhook configured successfully. The secret is shown only once.

data.message: Save this secret — it will not be shown again.

put.description: Stores encrypted Twilio credentials for outbound calling. All three fields are required.

from_number.description: Twilio phone number in E.164 format.

put.description: Stores encrypted MCube JWT token and executive number for outbound calling.

exe_number.description: MCube executive number (4-15 digits, optional + prefix).

put.description: Stores encrypted Exotel credentials for outbound calling. All six fields are required. The `caller_id` must be an E.164 phone number that Exotel has provisioned for your account.

account_sid.description: Exotel Account SID (SID of your Exotel account).

caller_id.description: Exotel-provisioned phone number used as the caller ID, in E.164 format.

applet_id.description: Exotel Applet (flow) ID used to handle the call.

put.description: Stores encrypted Plivo credentials for outbound calling. All three fields are required. The `from_number` must be an E.164 phone number that Plivo has provisioned for your account.

auth_id.description: Plivo Auth ID (starts with `MA` for production accounts, `SA` for subaccounts).

from_number.description: Plivo-provisioned phone number used as the caller ID, in E.164 format. Must have Voice capabilities enabled.

put.description: Changes the partner display name shown in the dashboard and API responses.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of the partner's agents, ordered by creation date (newest first). Deleted agents are excluded.

post.description: Creates a new voice AI agent. The `voice_id` must be from the partner's allowed voices list (see `GET /agent/voices`). The `language` must be from the partner's allowed languages. Agent names must be unique per partner.

prompt.description: System prompt defining the agent's personality and behavior.

voice_id.description: Cartesia voice ID from the allowed voices list.

language.description: Language code from the partner's allowed languages.

agent_type.description: Whether the agent handles inbound or outbound calls.

intro_message.description: Optional greeting spoken when a call connects.

project_id.description: Assign the agent to a specific project. Defaults to the default project if omitted.

enable_recording.description: Whether to record calls made with this agent.

kb_include_summaries.description: Include document summaries in KB search results.

kb_result_format.description: Custom format template for KB search results.

kb_enable_llm_processing.description: Enable LLM post-processing of KB search results.

kb_llm_system_prompt.description: System prompt for LLM KB processing.

error.message: Agent limit reached. Maximum 10 agents allowed.
An agent with this name already exists

get.description: Returns a single agent by ID.

put.description: Updates one or more agent fields. Only provided fields are changed. At least one field must be provided.

voice_id.description: New voice ID from allowed voices.

language.description: New language code from allowed languages.

intro_message.description: New greeting message. Pass `null` or empty string to remove.

project_id.description: Move the agent to a different project.

variables.description: List of pre-call variable names referenced in the prompt or greeting as `{{name}}`. Per-call values are supplied via the `variables` body field on `POST /calls/start`. Pass `null` to clear.

extraction_config.description: Custom Analysis config — runs an LLM extraction over the transcript after every completed call. Pass `null` to disable extraction.

error.message: An agent with this name already exists

delete.description: Soft-deletes an agent and removes all linked document associations. SuperMemory cleanup is handled asynchronously.

get.description: Returns the voices available to this partner, filtered from the Cartesia voice catalog. Optionally filter by language.

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: Filter voices by language code (e.g., `en`, `hi`). Case-insensitive partial match.

allowed_languages.description: Language codes the partner is allowed to use.

post.description: Creates a document record and returns a presigned S3 URL for uploading the file. After uploading, call `POST /documents/{id}/confirm` to finalize. The upload URL expires in 15 minutes.
Confirms that the file has been uploaded to S3. Verifies the file exists and transitions the document status from `uploading` to `ready`. Must be called after uploading to the presigned URL.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Document ID returned from the upload endpoint.

200.description: Upload confirmed, document is now ready.

error.message: Document has already been confirmed

post.description: Creates a document from a URL. The URL content will be crawled and indexed when linked to an agent. The document is immediately `ready` (no upload step needed).

get.description: Returns a paginated list of all documents, ordered by creation date (newest first). Each document includes the number of agents it is linked to.

agent_count.description: Number of agents this document is linked to.

get.description: Returns a single document with a temporary download URL (for file documents) or the original URL (for web links), plus a list of linked agents with their sync status.

download_url.description: Presigned download URL (file docs) or original URL (web links).

agents.description: Agents this document is linked to.

put.description: Updates the document name and/or description. At least one field must be provided. Invalidates KB cache for all agents linked to this document.

description.description: New description. Pass `null` or empty string to remove.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a document, removes the file from S3 (if applicable), and unlinks it from all agents. SuperMemory cleanup is handled asynchronously.

get.description: Returns every Soniox STT dictionary owned by the partner, ordered by creation date (newest first). The summary shape does not include the `terms` array -- fetch a single dictionary to see them.

post.description: Creates a new Soniox STT dictionary for the partner. Terms are normalized server-side: whitespace is trimmed, empty/whitespace-only entries are dropped, non-string entries are silently skipped, and the dedupe is case-insensitive but preserves first-occurrence casing. A blank `description` is stored as `null`. Dictionary names must be unique per partner.

description.description: Optional description. Blank strings are stored as null.

terms.description: Optional list of terms. Defaults to []. Normalized server-side.

example.name: Vocobase Product Catalog
example.description: Product names, SKUs, and plan tiers referenced on support calls.

data.name: Vocobase Product Catalog
data.description: Product names, SKUs, and plan tiers referenced on support calls.

409.description: Dictionary name already taken by this partner.

error.message: A dictionary with this name already exists.

get.description: Returns the full detail for a single dictionary, including the `terms` array.

error.message: Dictionary not found

patch.description: Updates any subset of `name`, `description`, or `terms`. Passing `terms` replaces the whole list -- there is no incremental add/remove. If the dictionary is attached to any agent and the new `char_count` would push that agent over 10,000 combined characters, the request fails with `DICTIONARY_CHAR_LIMIT_EXCEEDED`.

400.description: Validation error or character limit exceeded.

error.message: name must be between 1 and 100 characters
This update would push agent a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890 over the 10,000-character limit.
Dictionary not found

409.description: Dictionary name already taken by this partner.

error.message: A dictionary with this name already exists.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a dictionary and cascades the attachment rows. Detaches it from every agent it was attached to. No other data is touched.

error.message: Dictionary not found

get.description: Returns all documents linked to an agent, including their sync status.

post.description: Links one or more documents to an agent for knowledge base integration. Documents must be in `ready` status. Duplicate links are silently skipped (idempotent). Maximum 20 document IDs per request, 100 total linked documents per agent. Queues background sync jobs for newly linked documents.

document_ids.description: Array of document IDs to link.

201.description: Documents linked (or skipped if already linked).

skipped.description: Document IDs that were already linked.

403.description: Document link limit reached (max 100 per agent).

error.message: Cannot link documents. Agent would have 105 documents, exceeding the limit of 100.

delete.summary: Unlink a document from an agent
delete.description: Removes the association between a document and an agent. The document itself is not deleted. SuperMemory cleanup is handled asynchronously.

get.description: Returns all Soniox STT dictionaries currently attached to the agent. The summary shape does not include `description` or `terms`.

put.description: Idempotent set-replace: overwrites the agent's entire dictionary set with `dictionary_ids`. Duplicate ids are deduped silently. Every id must exist and belong to the calling partner, else the whole request fails with `VALIDATION_ERROR`. The combined `char_count` across the resulting set must be at most 10,000 characters; otherwise the request fails with `DICTIONARY_CHAR_LIMIT_EXCEEDED`. Pass `[]` to detach all dictionaries. The swap is wrapped in a transaction -- the attached set is never briefly partial.

dictionary_ids.description: Full replacement set of dictionary IDs. Pass [] to detach all.

200.description: Agent's attached dictionaries after the swap.

400.description: Validation error or character limit exceeded.

error.message: One or more dictionary_ids do not exist or are not owned by you
Attaching these dictionaries would exceed the 10,000-character limit for this agent.

post.description: Initiates an outbound phone call via MCube, Twilio, Exotel, or Plivo. Requires sufficient credits and available concurrency (max 5 concurrent calls). The provider you pass must appear in the partner's `allowed_telephony_providers` list and its credentials must already be configured. The call is placed asynchronously -- use webhooks or polling to track status updates.

agent_id.description: ID of the agent to use for this call.

to_number.description: Destination phone number in E.164 format.

provider.description: Telephony provider. Defaults to `mcube` if not specified. The provider must be in your partner's `allowed_telephony_providers` list and its credentials must be configured (see the `/config/telephony/*` endpoints).

variables.description: Pre-call variable values. Keys must match variable names declared on the agent (`Agent.variables`). Substituted into the agent's prompt and greeting via `{{name}}` placeholders. Echoed in the `session.completed` webhook for partner-side audit. Missing variables render as empty strings.

error.message: Insufficient credits
Maximum 5 concurrent calls allowed. 5 calls currently active.
Failed to initiate call. Please try again.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of calls, ordered by start time (newest first). Optionally filter by status.

Returns full call details including the associated session with transcript, credits used, and a temporary recording download URL (if recording was enabled). The `recording_url` is valid for 7 days; use `GET /calls/{id}/recording-url` to mint a fresh URL after expiry.

Mints a freshly signed download URL for the call's recording, valid for 7 days (the maximum the underlying storage allows). Use this when the `recording_url` returned by `GET /calls/{id}` or by the `session.completed` webhook has expired.

Returns 404 if the call has no recording, the call is not yet complete, or the recording file is no longer available in storage.

recording_url.description: Time-limited signed URL for downloading the recording (audio/wav).

expires_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp at which the URL expires.

404.description: Call not found, or recording is not available for this call.

error.message: Call not found

recordingNotAttached.summary: Call exists but has no recording (recording was disabled or call did not complete)

error.message: No recording is attached to this call
Recording file is no longer available in storage

post.description:
Re-runs post-call extraction against an existing session's stored transcript using the agent's CURRENT `extraction_config`. Useful after editing the config to backfill old sessions, or to test a config against real conversation data.

- `dry_run: true` — runs extraction, returns values, does NOT persist or re-fire the partner webhook
- `dry_run: false` (default) — persists to the session's `extraction` field; partner webhook is **not** re-fired (replays are dashboard-only).

Returns 400 when the agent has no `extraction_config` defined. Subject to the same partner rate-limit as `POST /calls/start` to prevent burst Gemini quota consumption.

dry_run.description: When true, return the extraction result without persisting it.

error.message: Agent has no extraction_config defined

post.description: Cancels all calls in `pending` or `ringing` status for the authenticated partner. Useful for cleaning up calls that did not connect.

dismissed.description: Number of calls that were canceled.

post.description: Creates a new campaign in `draft` status. Add contacts with `POST /campaigns/{id}/contacts`, then start the run with `POST /campaigns/{id}/start`.

agent_id.description: Agent used for every call in this campaign.

provider.description: Telephony provider. Must be in `allowed_telephony_providers` and have credentials configured.

concurrency_limit.description: Maximum concurrent active calls for this campaign. Clamped to 1-10.

403.description: Provider access denied (not in `allowed_telephony_providers` or credentials not configured).

get.description: Returns all campaigns created via the partner API, newest first.

post.description: Bulk-adds contacts to a campaign. The campaign must be in `draft` status. Up to 10,000 contacts per request; duplicates (same phone) are silently skipped. Existing contacts (by phone) are reused -- only new phones create new `Contact` rows.

duplicates.description: Phones already linked to this campaign (skipped).

post.description: Transitions the campaign from `draft` to `running`. Requires at least one contact and a minimum credit balance (0.3 display credits = 30 seconds at 1 credit/minute). The provider must still be in `allowed_telephony_providers`.

400.description: Invalid state (not `draft`), no contacts, or insufficient credits.

post.description: Pauses a `running` campaign. In-flight calls finish; new calls are not dispatched until the campaign resumes.

400.description: Campaign is not in a pausable state (only `running` campaigns can pause).

post.description: Resumes a `paused` or `credit_exhausted` campaign. If resuming from `credit_exhausted`, the caller must have restored a minimum credit balance.
Cancels a `running`, `paused`, or `credit_exhausted` campaign. All queued contacts are marked `skipped`. This action is terminal -- cancelled campaigns cannot be restarted.

400.description: Campaign is not in a stoppable state.

get.description: Returns contact counts grouped by status, average call duration, and total credits consumed.
Returns all projects for the authenticated partner, including agent counts.

post.description: Creates a new project. Project names must be unique per partner.

409.description: A project with this name already exists.

error.message: A project with this name already exists

get.description: Returns a single project by ID.

put.description: Updates a project's name and/or description.

409.description: A project with this name already exists.

error.message: A project with this name already exists

delete.description: Deletes a project. Cannot delete the default project or projects that still have agents.

400.description: Cannot delete default project or project with agents.

error.message: Cannot delete a project that has agents. Move or delete agents first.

bearerAuth.description: API key in format: `rg_live_xxxx`. Pass as a Bearer token in the Authorization header.

is_default.description: Whether this is the default project. Cannot be deleted.

agent_count.description: Number of agents in this project.

allowed_voices.description: Voice IDs available to this partner.

allowed_languages.description: Language codes available to this partner.

allowed_telephony_providers.description: Providers this partner is allowed to use when starting calls or campaigns. Managed by Vocobase platform admins.

status.description: Lifecycle state. New campaigns start as `draft`. Transition via start / pause / resume / stop. `credit_exhausted` is set automatically when the partner runs out of credits mid-run; resumable once credits are restored.

completed_count.description: Calls that reached a terminal state (completed, failed, no_answer, busy).

skipped_count.description: Contacts skipped when the campaign was stopped.

metadata.description: Optional JSON payload echoed back in session metadata and webhook events.

completed.description: Calls that reached a terminal state.

avg_duration_seconds.description: Average billed duration across completed calls. Null when no calls have completed.

total_credits.description: Display credits consumed by this campaign (1 credit = 60 seconds of voice).

variables.description: Pre-call variable names referenced in the prompt or greeting as `{{name}}`. Empty array when none are defined.

extraction_config.description: Custom Analysis config — when present, the platform runs an LLM extraction over each completed call's transcript and ships the result inline in the `session.completed` webhook.

project_id.description: ID of the project this agent belongs to. Defaults to the default project if not specified.

file_size.description: File size in bytes (null for web links).

sync_status.description: Whether this document has been indexed into the agent's knowledge base.

CallSession.description: Session data associated with a call. Included in call detail responses.

recording_url.description: Presigned URL to download the call recording (audio/wav). Valid for 7 days from the time of this response. Use `GET /calls/{id}/recording-url` to mint a fresh URL after expiry. `null` if recording was not enabled or the call has not completed.

variables.description: Pre-call variable values resolved at session-start, substituted into the agent's prompt and greeting via `{{name}}`. Empty object when no variables were supplied.

extraction.description: Post-call extraction result. `null` until the session-queue worker runs extraction (after the call ends). Always `null` when the agent has no `extraction_config`.

ExtractionConfig.description: Custom Analysis schema — defines what the post-call extraction LLM should pull from each completed call's transcript.

prompt.description: Free-form analysis prompt. Describe the data you want extracted; reference the keys by name.

includeToolLogs.description: When true, the extraction LLM also sees the agent's tool calls + KB hits, not just the transcript. Useful for catching things like 'did the agent search for X' or 'what was the booking outcome'.

ExtractionResult.description: Structured output of a single extraction run. Shipped inline in `session.completed` webhooks AND returned by `POST /calls/{id}/extract`.

values.description: Extracted fields, typed per the agent's `extraction_config.keys`. Missing keys are emitted as `null` (per-key `nullable: true` on the response schema). Absent entirely when `status != 'success'`.

attempts.description: Number of attempts (1 = success on first try; 2-3 = retried).

term_count.description: Number of unique terms after normalization.

attached_agent_count.description: Number of agents this dictionary is currently attached to.

terms.description: Normalized list of terms (whitespace-trimmed, case-insensitively deduped, non-string entries dropped).

AttachedDictionarySummary.description: Compact dictionary view used when listing an agent's attached dictionaries. Omits `description` and `terms`.

ValidationError.description: Validation error in request body or parameters.

error.message: agent_name is required and must be max 50 characters
Invalid or missing API key
Resource not found
An unexpected error occurred
